# @cascivo/example-react-vite

> Vite + React example app using cascivo

[cascivo.com](https://cascivo.com) · [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com) · [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/urbanisierung/cascivo)

Cascade React + Vite — minimal example app showing cascivo components in a Vite + React project. Starting point for the copy-paste workflow with `npx cascivo add`.
